arts.ttl: Watch - Cole Palmer: Made in St Kitts
arts.sum: Tracing the origins of Chelsea sensation Cole Palmer to the Caribbean island of St Kitts.

arts.ttl: Chelsea drop Man City team news hint early as Christopher Nkunku shares update amid transfer links
arts.sum: Hours after that speculation arose, Nkunku is one of several Blues players to share a matchday graphic ahead of their match against Man City. Nkunku, 27, has not played in any of the Blues' matches in the Premier League this month, only being an unused substitute despite starting and playing the full 90 minutes in their FA Cup third-round tie against Morecambe at Stamford Bridge .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca faces transfer decision as Chelsea star linked with shock January exit
arts.sum: It has been claimed they are hoping to convince Chelsea to sanction an 18-month loan before signing him permanently for around £30million (€35m). The club paid £45million to sign him from Atletico Madrid, though he plays second fiddle to Cole Palmer.

arts.ttl: 'Amazing' - Man City can unleash £12.5million gem as stunning showing sends message
arts.sum: Claudio Echeverri scored twice in a vcirtuoso performance for Argentina Under-20s in a 6-0 rout of Brazil

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Chelsea - TV channel, kick-off time, live stream details
arts.sum: Manchester City and Chelsea will go head-to-head in the Premier League at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Full Chelsea squad available to face Man City as nine unavailable amid transfer exit
arts.sum: Here, football.london takes a look at the full Chelsea squad expected to be available to face Manchester City. Chelsea return to Premier League action this evening when they take on Manchester City.

arts.ttl: 10 man City battle to victory against Leeds
arts.sum: In a dominant first-half display by Oliver Reiss ’s team, Harrison Miles handed City the breakthrough on 32 minutes, with a direct strike beating George Kenyon from far out, before Divine Mukasa drilled in his 12th goal of the campaign in fine fashion. Oliver Reiss ’s team increased the pressure on the visitors, as Fletcher had another opportunity denied by Kenyon, before the second ball reached Miles in the box who shot agonisingly wide of the post.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer latest as offer 'rejected' for fourth signing amid £135m splurge
arts.sum: Manchester City have committed around £135million this winter transfer window on Abdukodir Khusanov, Omar Marmoush and Vitor Reis - but still reportedly want a fourth signing.

arts.ttl: Man United discuss Nkunku move as Chelsea ‘remain keen’ on Garnacho
arts.sum: Man United are reportedly discussing the possibility of making a loan move for wantaway Chelsea attacker Christopher Nkunku. The Red Devils are looking to improve their frontline in the January transfer window having scored just 27 goals in 22 Premier League matches, the joint sixth-lowest tally in the division. Nkunku is seeking a way out […] The post Man United discuss Nkunku move as Chelsea ‘remain keen’ on Garnacho first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix: Chelsea forward to miss Man City clash after family bereavement
arts.sum: Portuguese international has flown home having been granted compassionate leave by the club
